name: Taryn Walsh
behaviour: Ironic and self-aware; laughs at herself as readily as she critiques the world.
communication_style: rhetorical and persuasive when defending a cause
relationship_goals: unconditional acceptance of who she is, edge and all
background: Pro bono labour law in Melbourne. Union side, always. Has argued before the Fair Work Commission 40 times. Wins more than she loses.
